description.content: Routes for auth

Controller: registerUser
Schema: registerSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| name | string | Required |
| fatherName | string | Required |
| surname | string | Required |
| email | string | Optional |
| role | string | Optional |
| birthDate | date | Required |
| phoneNumber | string | Required |
| whatsappNumber | string | Required |
| gender | string | Required |
| hrNo | string | Required |
| currentCity | string | Required |
| addresses | array | Required |
| addresses[].id | string | Optional |
| addresses[].address | string | Required |
| addresses[].city | string | Required |
| addresses[].district | string | Required |
| addresses[].state | string | Required |
| addresses[].country | string | Required |
| addresses[].pincode | string | Required |
| addresses[].type | string | Optional |
| occupation | string | Required |
| professions | array | Required |
| education | array | Required |
| maritalStatus | string | Required |
| bloodGroup | string | Required |
| study | object | Optional |
| skill | string | Optional |
| hobbies | string | Optional |
| talents | array | Optional |
| awards | array | Optional |
| class10 | object | Required |
| class10.class | string | Required |
| class10.isStudded | boolean | Optional |
| class10.branch | string | Optional |
| class10.passingYear | string | Optional |
| class10.medium | string | Optional |
| class10.hostel | boolean | Optional |
| class12 | object | Required |
| class12.class | string | Required |
| class12.isStudded | boolean | Optional |
| class12.branch | string | Optional |
| class12.passingYear | string | Optional |
| class12.medium | string | Optional |
| class12.hostel | boolean | Optional |

body.raw:
{
  "name": "John",
  "fatherName": "Robert",
  "surname": "Doe",
  "email": "john@example.com",
  "role": "sample_role",
  "birthDate": "2000-01-01",
  "phoneNumber": "9876543210",
  "whatsappNumber": "9876543210",
  "gender": "male",
  "hrNo": "HR001",
  "currentCity": "Ahmedabad",
  "addresses": [
    {
      "address": "123 Main St",
      "city": "Ahmedabad",
      "district": "Ahmedabad",
      "state": "Gujarat",
      "country": "India",
      "pincode": "380001",
      "type": "current"
    }
  ],
  "occupation": "Engineer",
  "professions": [
    "Software Developer"
  ],
  "education": [
    "B.Tech"
  ],
  "maritalStatus": "single",
  "bloodGroup": "O+",
  "study": {},
  "skill": "Coding",
  "hobbies": "Reading",
  "talents": [
    "Singing"
  ],
  "awards": [
    "Best Student"
  ],
  "class10": {
    "class": "10",
    "isStudded": true,
    "branch": "Science",
    "passingYear": "2015",
    "medium": "English",
    "hostel": false
  },
  "class12": {
    "class": "12",
    "isStudded": true,
    "branch": "Science",
    "passingYear": "2017",
    "medium": "English",
    "hostel": false
  }
}
